grass.translate: трава, травка, газон, злак, луг, засевать травой, пастись, подножный

examples.eng: Keep off the grass!
examples.ru: а) не ходи(те) по траве!., «по газону не ходить» (надпись)., б) проявляй осторожность!., не суйся, где опасно!

examples.eng: The grass was knee-high.
Don't tread on the grass.
We picnicked on the grass.
Keep off the grass.
They were smoking some grass.
They lounged on the grass.
The grass was wet with dew.
The grass is brightly green.
When fall came he planted grass.
examples.ru: Когда наступила осень, он посеял траву.

examples.eng: I paid him $5 to cut the grass.
examples.ru: Я дал ему пять долларов, чтобы он подстриг траву.

examples.eng: He grassed on them to the police.
examples.ru: Он донёс на них в полицию.

examples.eng: The grass was covered with frost.
Will those grass stains wash out?
People were sunbathing on the grass.
a mat of weeds and grass
Swaths of new-shorn grass.
We tromped over the grass.
The grass softened my fall.
The grass covered the grave.
grass new washed by the rain
The grass tickled her calves
She trod barefoot on the soft grass.
examples.ru: Она ступала босыми ногами по мягкой траве.

examples.eng: a bag full of grass cuttings
fields green with meadow grass
The tall grass whipped in the wind.
All grasses need light to grow well.
examples.ru: Чтобы хорошо расти, всем травам нужен свет.

examples.eng: the rich greenery of grass and trees
The only growth was some salt grass.
The plant naturalizes well in grass.
examples.ru: Это растение хорошо приживается в траве.
